airports.name: ANDERSTORP
contactLines: PPR mandatory for RWY and heliport.
Heliport only avbl for ambulance and rescue flights.

airports.name: ARBOGA
contactLines: Only traffic with special agreement allowed.
PPR only in case of exception.
Limited fire fighting, rescue and handling service O/R.

airports.name: ARVIKA
contactLines: More than three TGL only permitted weekdays 0700-1600 (0600-1500).
PCL on freq 123.350 MHz for 15 sec duration followed by a double click.
After departure RWY 19, climb straight ahead and no left turn until after passing S of highway 61.
Other activities including motor vehicles may occur on RWY, TWY and APN.
Wildlife common in aerodrome area. Sporadic snow clearance.
Credit cards accepted for payment of fuel.

airports.name: BORGLANDA
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 03.

airports.name: BORÅS
contactLines: Flying activity are not allowed Good Friday, Easter Eve, Whitsun Eve, Whitsunday, Midsummer Eve, first connected SAT-SUN in JUL, Christmas Eve, Christmas Day and Day after Christmas Day.
Landing with gliders excepted from hours and days above.
TGL not allowed for visiting ACFT and HEL.
For gliders right hand traffic circuit to RWY 04R.
PCL on freq 123.525 MHz, 10 sec duration.
After take-off RWY 22R/L turn left immediately.

airports.name: DALA-JÄRNA
contactLines: Repeated take-offs and landings not allowed:
Exemption can be applied for with the airport manager.

airports.name: EKSJÖ/RÄNNESLÄTT
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 01.

airports.name: ENKÖPING/LÅNGTORA
contactLines: Repeated/practice take-offs and landings not allowed.
Glider traffic, circuit always north of RWY.
Motor traffic, circuit always south of RWY.

airports.name: ESLÖV
contactLines: PPR for take-off/landing exercises by visiting ACFT, +46 705 54 70 00. RWY 06/24 not to be used for repeated take-off/landing exercises. Right hand traffic circuit when RWY 24 and 30 is in use.

airports.name: FALKÖPING
contactLines: Other activities may occur on RWY, TWY and apron.

airports.name: GAGNEF
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 08.
Other activities may occur on RWY.
RWY conditions wet and swampy after heavy rain.

airports.name: GARGNÄS
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 35.

airports.name: GNESTA/VÄNGSÖ
contactLines: Use RWY 03/21 only in strong wind.
Caution, glider flying close to airport

airports.name: GRYTTJOM
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 35.

airports.name: GÄVLE
contactLines: PPR H24 RWY18/36 Grass RWY not affected. For permission
After TKOF RWY 18/36, including grass RWY, light ACFT (<2000 kg) shall climb straight ahead to MNM 500 ft GND before initiating turn.
Light ACFT (<2000 kg) shall avoid overflying village of Rörberg east of aerodrome below 1200 ft AMSL.
For gliders using grass RWY 36 right hand circuit applies.
Other activities may occur on RWY, TWY and APN.
PCL on freq 123.600 MHz, 10 sec duration.

airports.name: HUDIKSVALL
contactLines: Motor activities on RWY may occur.

airports.name: HULTSFRED-VIMMERBY
contactLines: PCL by 5 pulses of aprx 1 sec duration on freq 123.550 MHz.

airports.name: HÄLLEFORS
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 36.

airports.name: HÄRNÖSAND/MYRAN
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 28.

airports.name: HÖGANÄS
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 06 and 32.
Lighted obst 194 ft GND W THR 06.

airports.name: IDRE
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 33.

airports.name: KARLSKOGA
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 21.
Other motor and glider activity may occur.

airports.name: KATRINEHOLM
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit for powered aircraft when RWY 33 is in use.

airports.name: KÖPING
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 25.
Climb to 700 ft AMSL track 050 or 230 until initiating turn.
PPR for all take-off and landing exercises.
No flying below 2000 ft over city.
Model flying area south of RWY, GND-1550 ft AMSL.
PCL on freq 123.150 MHz, 12 sec duration.

airports.name: LANDSKRONA
contactLines: PPR for repeated take-offs and landings.
Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 12R for powered aeroplanes and helicopters and to RWY 30R for gliders. PCL on freq 123.350 MHz,

airports.name: LIDKÖPING
contactLines: PCL on freq 131.765 MHz, 10 sec duration.
Repeated take-off and landing exercises (TGL) during darkness only permitted ordinary Tuesdays 1800-2000 (1700-1900).
Solar panels along runway south side 30 m from edge.

airports.name: LJUSDAL
contactLines: Overflying of surface quarry on 614800N 0155900E 1000m S of Ljusdal AD should be avoided below 2000 ft AMSL.

airports.name: LUDVIKA
contactLines: Turbulence over RWY when wind from the east.

airports.name: MALUNG/SKINNLANDA
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit when RWY 16 is in use.
RWY and lightning facilities TEMPO CLSD during winter season. Info on www.malungsflygklubb.se

airports.name: MELLANSEL
contactLines: Further 235 m available in emergency when landing RWY 27.

airports.name: NORRTÄLJE
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 07.
RWY lights 3 m outside ASPH edge.
Only 650 meter starting from THR RWY 25.
PCL on freq 123.325 MHz 8 sec duration.
TGL not allowed 2100-0600 (2000-0500) during weekdays and 1800-0800 (1700-0700) during HOL.

airports.name: OPTAND
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 33 and 36.
Situated near restricted area ES R08C.

airports.name: ORSA
contactLines: Motor activities on RWY may occur.
Grass area preferably for ultra light, winchlaunching of gliders and parachute jumping.

airports.name: OSKARSHAMN
contactLines: Other activities may occur on RWY, TWY and apron see NOTAM.

airports.name: OVIKEN
contactLines: Caution - Low level turbulence/Lee wave rotor in wind directions from SW to NW.

airports.name: PITEÅ
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit for RWY 16.

airports.name: RÅDA
contactLines: Permission will be granted in exceptional cases only.

airports.name: SILJANSNÄS
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 14.

airports.name: SJÖBO SÖVDE
contactLines: For powered aircraft right hand traffic circuit when RWY 30 is in use.
For gliders right hand traffic circuit when RWY 12 is in use.

airports.name: SKÖVDE
contactLines: PCL on freq 123.055 MHz, 10 sec duration.

airports.name: SMÅLANDSSTENAR
contactLines: After TKOF RWY 22 climb on RWY heading until 700 ft AMSL (160 ft AGL). Turn right and climb on heading 235° to MNM 1500 ft AMSL (1000 ft AGL).
PCL on freq 123.200 MHz, 20 sec duration.

airports.name: STOCKHOLM/SKÅ-EDEBY
contactLines: NOV-APR soft or CLSD RWY, call for condition.
Helicopter traffic not accepted exc police and rescue operations.

airports.name: STORVIK/LEMSTANÄS
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 06.

airports.name: SUNDBRO
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 03 and 08.
TKOF RWY 21: immediate right turn to track 217° MAG.
5 transmissions of APRX 0.5 sec during 10 sec.
SAT, SUN, day before HOL, HOL:
SUN, day before HOL, HOL: PPR
PPR for school flights and glider towing.
Landing with gliders exempted from PPR.

airports.name: SÖDERHAMN
contactLines: Swedish MIL ACFT and all ACFT operating for Hosp, Police, Sea Rescue, Coast Guard and MSB duty exempted from PPR.

airports.name: TIDAHOLM/BÄMMELSHED
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 22. Downdraft may occur when easterly winds.

airports.name: TIERP
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 34.

airports.name: VARBERG
contactLines: Special permission required to use RWY 06/24.
PCL on freq 123.150 MHz, 10 sec duration.

airports.name: VELLINGE
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 03.

airports.name: VÅRGÅRDA
contactLines: Motor activities on RWY may occur.
After take-off RWY 04 turn left immediately, climb on track 015° to 1000 ft GND before commencing turn.
After take-off RWY 22 turn left immediately, climb on track 210° to 1000 ft GND before commencing turn.
Overflying Vårgårda village SE of AD shall be avoided below 2300 ft MSL.

airports.name: VÄSTERVIK
contactLines: PCL on freq 131.615 MHz, 20 sec duration.

airports.name: VÄSTERÅS/JOHANNISBERG
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit when RWY 05 or RWY 16 is in use.
Take off and landing exercises not allowed:

airports.name: ÅLLEBERG
contactLines: Gliders only, direction of traffic circuit depending on wind direction.
Winch launching of gliders may occur.

airports.name: ÅVIKEN/ÅVIKEN FLY CAMP
airports.ownerOperator: AVIKEN FLY CAMP HIGH COAST AB

airports.name: ÄLMHULT/MÖCKELN
contactLines: Right hand traffic circuit to RWY 03.
